description: Root .blox document containing schema metadata, a template or block definition, and checkpoint state.

__schema0.description: Optional JSON Schema URI used by editors for validation and autocomplete.

__schema1.description: Optional internal schema revision of the .blox document format.

__schema2.description: Primary definition payload for this .blox file (template or block).

__schema3.description: Block definition that extends template fields with template and block dependency lists.

__schema4.description: Shell command executed after files are rendered during init or add operations.

__schema5.description: Shell command executed when this block or template is added to a project.

__schema6.description: Shell command executed after this block or template is updated to a newer checkpoint.

__schema7.description: Shell command executed when this block or template is removed from a project.

__schema8.description: Stable template identifier used in registry entries and checkpoint keys.

__schema9.description: Optional major version number for this template definition.

__schema10.description: Glob patterns excluded from template file init and update operations.

__schema12.description: Optional list of base templates that this template extends. Each entry can point to a specific version or a version range.

__schema13.description: Reference to a single base template and optional version selector.

__schema14.description: Name of a base template that this template extends.

__schema16.description: Version selector for a dependency. Use a single number for an exact version, or [minVersion, maxVersion] for an inclusive range.

__schema19.description: Template dependencies required before this block can be safely added or updated.

__schema20.description: Reference to one template dependency and optional version selector.

__schema21.description: Template dependency name required by this block.

__schema23.description: Block dependencies that should exist for this block to function correctly.

__schema24.description: Reference to one block dependency and optional version selector.

__schema25.description: Block dependency name required by this block.

__schema27.description: Template definition used in .blox files and resolved by template-based workflows.

__schema28.description: Resolved checkpoint map used to track dependency revisions across updates.

__schema30.description: Checkpoint metadata describing where a template or block dependency is pinned.

__schema31.description: Git commit hash representing the exact checkpoint snapshot for this dependency.

__schema32.description: Optional numeric version label associated with this checkpoint.

__schema33.description: Optional source branch name used when resolving or updating this checkpoint.

__schema34.description: Optional project-scoped settings applied while running BLOX commands.

__schema35.description: Project-level glob patterns excluded from migration and update operations.

title: Blox Block Definition
